report.summary: Audited 12 recent learn pages for UX issues, fixed BackToTop/Breadcrumb on 2 pages (starknet, unichain), added canonical URLs to 6 pages, created 4 OG images (1200x630 SVG) for starknet, ton-defi, unichain, and smart-money guides.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: starknet-validity-rollup-guide-2026: Replaced manual breadcrumb nav with standard Breadcrumb component, added BackToTop component, added canonical URL
unichain-uniswap-layer-2-guide-2026: Replaced manual breadcrumb nav with standard Breadcrumb component, added BackToTop component, added canonical URL
ton-defi-ecosystem-guide-2026: Added missing canonical URL for SEO
rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield-comparison-2026: Added missing canonical URL for SEO
data-availability-celestia-eigenda-avail-comparison-2026: Added missing canonical URL for SEO
crypto-leverage-trading-guide-2026: Added missing canonical URL for SEO

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: starknet-validity-rollup-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — purple/indigo ZK theme, $542M TVL / 1.1B STRK Staked / Decentralized Sequencing stat cards
OG image: ton-defi-ecosystem-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — TON blue theme, 950M Users / DeFi Growth / Mini Apps stat cards
OG image: unichain-uniswap-layer-2-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — Uniswap pink theme, $100B+ Volume / 1s Blocks / 65% Revenue Share stat cards
OG image: smart-money-onchain-signals-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — green/cyan theme, Whale Tracking / On-Chain Alpha / Copy Trading stat cards

sections.title: Audit Findings (Deferred)
items: MEDIUM: 4 pages still missing OG images: citrea-bitcoin-zk-rollup (uses og-citrea-guide.svg naming), rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield, data-availability-celestia, crypto-leverage-trading, crypto-bear-market-investing — queued for next design cycle
MEDIUM: Badge/button padding below 44px mobile touch target persists across most learn pages — recommend global CSS refactor
LOW: Hardcoded font sizes (26px, 20px, 14px) instead of clamp() on older pages — progressive fix needed
All 12 audited pages have proper metadata, openGraph, twitter cards, structured data (article + FAQ schemas), and breadcrumb navigation
